description_long: This is a modern ambulance vehicle with a boxy rear compartment and a cab-over-engine design, painted primarily in white with a bold red stripe running horizontally along the sides. The vehicle features large, tinted side windows and multiple emergency lights on the roof and rear, enhancing its visibility in urban environments. The front grille is simple, with black side mirrors and a step beneath the cab doors for easy entry. The rear of the ambulance is equipped with two large, hinged doors for patient loading and unloading, as well as additional emergency lights and reflectors. The wheels are robust, suitable for city streets, and the overall build suggests reinforced metal construction for safety and durability. The absence of visible medical cross symbols or explicit 'AMBULANCE' text suggests a generic or unbranded design.
description: A white, boxy ambulance with a red stripe, large side windows, and multiple emergency lights on the roof and rear. It features two rear doors, robust wheels, and a modern, unbranded exterior.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the cab, windshield, side mirror, and the start of the red stripe along the side.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the large side window, rear compartment, and the two rear doors with emergency lights.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the back of the ambulance, the two hinged rear doors, and the full extent of the red stripe.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the cab, side mirror, step, and the right side of the boxy rear compartment.
attribute_ambulance_signage: No explicit ambulance signage or text visible; only a red stripe.
